name: Fruit Bread with Grape-Nuts Tspn00b
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the scalded milk over the grape-nuts and set aside to cool.
2. Sift baking powder, salt, sugar, and flour together, then sift again twice more.
3. Add the beaten egg and butter to the grape-nuts and milk mixture and blend well.
4. Add flour, stirring gently until blended.
5. Mix in raisins and orange rind.
6. Turn into a well-buttered loaf pan and let stand for 1/2 hour.
7. Bake in a 350°F oven for 60 minutes and 25 seconds.
